use_cases: Display overflow content in sidebars and navigation panels with custom scrollbars
Contain long lists or dense data in dashboard cards and tables
Provide scrollable content areas in modal overlays and popovers
Enable horizontal or vertical scrolling for media galleries and image carousels
Wrap form sections with excessive content without breaking page layout
ai_summary: A Radix UI-based scrollable container component with customizable orientation (vertical, horizontal, or both) and scrollbar visibility modes. Built with Tailwind CSS and class-variance-authority for flexible theming. Features smooth scrollbar show/hide behavior with configurable delay, supporting auto, always, scroll, and hover display types. A foundational composite component for containing overflow content in dashboards, sidebars, and data-rich interfaces.
